overview.short: Shikharji (Śikharjī), also known as Sammet or Sammed Shikharji, is one of the holiest pilgrimage sites for Jains, in Giridih district, Jharkhand.
overview.description: Shikharji (Śikharjī), also known as Sammet or Sammed Shikharji, is one of the holiest pilgrimage sites for Jains, in Giridih district, Jharkhand. It is located on Parasnath hill, the highest mountain in the state of Jharkhand. It is the most important Jain Tirtha (pilgrimage site), for it is believed to be the place where twenty of the twenty-four Jain tirthankaras (supreme preachers of dharma) along with many other monks attained moksha. It is one of the seven principal pilgrimage destinations along with Girnar, Pawapuri, Champapuri, Dilwara, Palitana, and Ashtapad Kailash.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Parasnath
topPlaces.description: Parasnath Hill (also Sammet Shikhar, Marang Buru) is a mountain peak in the Parasnath hill range. It is located towards the eastern end of the Chota Nagpur Plateau in the Giridih district (Hazaribagh district in British India) of the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Madhuban, Giridih
topPlaces.description: Madhuban is a village in the Pirtand CD block in the Dumri subdivision of the Giridih district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Topchanchi Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Topchanchi Wildlife Sanctuary is an 8.75 km2 (3.38 sq mi) protected area located near the town of Topchanchi, Jharkhand. The sanctuary is situated alongside National Highway 2.

topPlaces.name: Topchanchi (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Topchanchi is a community development block that forms an administrative division in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district, Jharkhand state, India.

topPlaces.name: Hariharpur, Dhanbad
topPlaces.description: Hariharpur is a census town in Topchanchi CD block in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Bhandra
topPlaces.description: Bhandra (also called Bhendra) is a census town in the Nawadih CD block in the Bermo subdivision of the Bokaro district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Topchanchi
topPlaces.description: Topchanchi is a census town in Topchanchi CD block in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Pirtand block
topPlaces.description: Pirtand is a community development block (CD block) that forms an administrative division in the Dumri sub-division of the Giridih district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shikharji?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shikharji is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (110 km) and the nearest railway station is Dhanbad Junction (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shikharji?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shikharji at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shikharji?
faq.a: Stays in Shikharji start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shikharji?
faq.a: The top attractions are Parasnath, Madhuban, Giridih, Topchanchi Wildlife Sanctuary, Topchanchi (community development block), Hariharpur, Dhanbad.
